_note: Shares outstanding per BIST-listed bank, used for market cap = close × shares. Seeded from Yahoo quoteSummary defaultKeyStatistics.sharesOutstanding. The scraper refreshes these best-effort each run; this file is the committed fallback. Refresh on capital actions (bonus/rights issues). QNBFB is omitted — its float is ~0.12% and Yahoo carries no tradeable price for QNBFB.IS, so no market cap can be formed.
